name: io.github.itcons-app/mcp
title: Itcons.app
description: Model Context Protocol server for connecting AI assistants to Itcons.app work orders, work reports, projects, clients, users, and resources.

environmentVariables.name: ITCONS_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Itcons.app tenant domain, for example 'demo' for https://demo.itcons.app.

environmentVariables.name: ITCONS_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Itcons.app username or email for local stdio usage.

environmentVariables.name: ITCONS_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Itcons.app password for local stdio usage.

environmentVariables.name: ITCONS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Existing Itcons.app bearer token. Can be used instead of username and password.
